title: Novella
description: Updating Minecraft's design and aesthetic, with an emphasis on exploration
body:
_Minecraft's simple animations, effects, and mechanics are iconic, but this pack is for people who want those things to feel updated. Novella focuses on overhauling exploration, world gen, textures, audio, and animations to make them feel more like a game that came out in the 2020s. Novella is about exploring a bright, lively world and discovering all new structures, mechanics, and dimensions in a way that is accessible to everyone and not overly technical._

### ⭐ Want to learn all the new content? Check out the [Beginner's Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-w6Ik9GpVpwe44xidVeNdLkQJm1oFyhAGAFKwNRwlyI/edit?usp=sharing)

## This pack adds:  
🟥 **New enchantments, mechanics, and progression to add new content that still feels like Minecraft**  
🟧 **Overhauled visuals with Whimscape, Hold my Items, Fresh Animations, and tons more**  
🟨 **New world gen with WWOO, Amplified Nether, Nullscape, and tons of new structures**  
🟩 **Overhauled Mob spawning mechanics to make the world feel fresh, alive, and unexpected**  
🟦 **Quality of life improvements with Falling Tree, Easy Magic, Infinite Trading, and other community favorite mods**  
🟪 **Lightweight, runs on Fabric!**  

For a full list of mods, check the Versions page, or download it and check it out!

_Disclaimer: Any dysfunction of Complimentary Shaders is a result of this modpack, not the shader itself._
